title: elaphoglossum durum
intro: Elaphoglossum durum is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to tropical Central and South America. It is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, providing several health benefits. In herbal preparations, Elaphoglossum durum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
